name: Tiramisu
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Heavy cream, whipped to form soft peaks
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bowl of an electric mixer, beat the egg yolks and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the mascarpone and mix on low speed for 2 minutes.
3. Fold in the whipped cream mixture; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the espresso, brandy, and grappa.
5. Dip 15 of the ladyfingers one at a time into the espresso mixture and arrange in a single layer on a 10-by-15-inch platter or a baking sheet, forming a rectangle about 7 by 13 inches.
6. Cover with half the mascarpone mixture.
7. Repeat the layers with 15 more dipped ladyfingers, then the remaining mascarpone mixture.
8. Sift the powdered chocolate over the top.
9. Halve the remaining 18 ladyfingers and arrange them vertically around the edge of the cake.
10. Cut into squares to serve.
Makes 12 servings
